title: Slimefun - To Infinity
description:
A texture pack made specifically for Slimefun with various Vanilla improvements.
A complete labor of love!
body:
![To Infinity by Racingsky Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d82cb6a65bff669f25c12d5758e62a4feaded2e5.png)

# **Overhauling the Slimefun experience**
This texture pack aims to enhance the server plugin [Slimefun4](https://github.com/Slimefun/Slimefun4) by adding textures to TONS of items! I've been hard at work making my pack work on every version between 1.19.4 to 1.21.8. Currently, Slimefun hasn't updated past 1.20.6 but using ViaVersion allows newer clients can connect to older servers! This lets me take advantage of the new resource pack features of 1.21.5+

*_All my tests are on a 1.20.4 server with ViaVersion installed._


<details>
<summary>Recommendations for Client Versions</summary>

- 1.19.4
  - CIT Resewn (1.1.5+1.19.4)
- 1.20, 1.20.1 and 1.20.2
  - CIT Resewn (1.2.2+1.20.1)
- 1.20.4
  - CIT Resewn (1.1.5+1.20.4)
  - Optifine (1.20.4 HD I8_pre4 Ultra, only one tested)
- 1.20.3, 1.20.5, 1.20.6, 1.21.2 and 1.21.3
  - Item-models.yml installed Server-side
- 1.21 and 1.21.1
  - CIT Resewn (1.2.2+1.21)
- 1.21.4 and 1.21.5
  - Vanilla with respective compat pack (info below)
- 1.21.6+ **(Personal Favorite)**
  - Vanilla (No mods required!)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Compatibility Packs</summary>


2 Versions of Minecraft require packs that fix compatiblity
- 1.21.4 and 1.21.5
- The respective packs are available for download from the latest version

</details>

<details>
<summary>Item-models.yml</summary>
  
Every version from 1.19.4 to 1.21.8 works perfectly with the Item-models.yml. If you have access to the server, I highly recommend you install it.
  - item-models.yml is included in the Resource Pack Zip file
    - Replace the file on the server in: "Server Folder" > plugins > Slimefun > item-models.yml

</details>


<details>
<summary>Supported Addons for Slimefun</summary>

- Dyed Backpacks
- Electric Spawners
- Exotic Garden
- ExtraGear
- Flower Power
- Fluffy Machines
- Foxy Machines
- Galactifun
- Hotbar Pets
- Infinity Expansion (Mob Simulation & Materials)
- Mob Capturer
- Potion Expansion
- Private Storage
- Slimefun Ore Chunks
- Slime Tinker
- Slimy TreeTaps
- Soul Jars

</details>


<details>
<summary>Overlays</summary>
For Clients on 1.21.5+ or using CIT Resewn, putting a piece of paper into an anvil and renaming it to a specific machine will give you an overlay. (Optifine should also work but it has been very hit or miss. Results will vary.)

Supported machines are as follows:

- All Basic Machines (except Output Chest)
- Magical Gadgets
  - Ancient Pedestal & Ancient Altar
- Galactifun
  - Super Fan
  - Ender Block
  - Stargate Ring & Controller
  - All Machines (except Fusion Reactor & Atmospheric Harvester)
- Infinity Expansion
  - Advanced Anvil
  - Infinity Workbench
  - Basic Cobble Generator
  - Basic Virtual Farm
- Slimy TreeTaps
  - Rubber Factory
  - Resin Extractor
- SlimeTinker
  - All Workstations
- Fluffy Machines
  - All Machines
- Foxy Machines
  - All Machines
- Energy and Electricity
  - All Machines (Not Capacitors or Energy Regulator/Connectors)
- GPS-Based Machines
  - All Placeables (except Teleporter Pylon)
- Programable Androids
  - Both Interfaces

</details>

Made for my Slimefun Squared Series on my [Youtube channel](https://www.youtube.com/racingsky)! If you intend to make your own videos using this pack, please put https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/to-infinity in your description. Thank you!

## Overview Video

This is a bit outdated now as I removed the custom website but should get the idea across!
I'm not the best at explaining things but I hope this helps give you an idea!

## Optional Fabric Mods:
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
- [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica)
